recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Critters 3
recommendations.overview: As fanged, furious furballs viciously invade an L.A. apartment building and sink their teeth into the low-rent tenants, Josh leads the battle to beat back the conniving critters and save the planet.

recommendations.title: 2036 Origin Unknown
recommendations.overview: After the first manned mission to Mars ends in a deadly crash, mission controller Mackenzie 'Mack' Wilson assists an artificial intelligence system, A.R.T.I. Their investigation uncovers a mysterious object under the surface of Mars that could change

recommendations.title: Moonshot
recommendations.overview: In a future where Mars is terraformed and colonized by the best humanity has to offer, two very different college students wind up joining forces and sneak onboard a space shuttle to the red planet in order to be united with their significant others.

recommendations.title: Robinson Crusoe on Mars
recommendations.overview: Stranded on Mars with only a monkey as a companion, an astronaut must figure out how to find oxygen, water, and food and companionship on the lifeless planet.

recommendations.title: The Space Between Us
recommendations.overview: A young man raised by scientists on Mars returns to Earth to find his father.

recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: The Martian
recommendations.overview: During a manned mission to Mars, Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead after a fierce storm and left behind by his crew. But Watney has survived and finds himself stranded and alone on the hostile planet. With only meager supplies, he must draw upon

recommendations.title: Total Recall
